clue_chain_pattern.description: The fall itself → prior arrangement (letter, meeting, deal) between culprit and victim → conflict escalation at the gathering identifies culprit.

stages.prompt: Physical arrangement of the fall (angle, height, ledge state) shows the fall was not accidental.
A prior letter, message, or deal-record between culprit and victim reveals a specific ongoing conflict.
A witness recalls a specific exchange during the gathering that escalated the conflict.

steps.prompt: Vesper names the ledge and the fall.
For each player, name the clue they almost caught.
Vesper credits the culprit's best deception move.
One small line naming the document and the culprit.
